description: Ambiguous 'users' request should route to lm_user, not lm_device or lm_session

steps.userPrompt: Show me all the users in the portal.

description: Question about installed collectors should select lm_collector, not lm_collector_group

steps.userPrompt: What collectors are currently installed in our environment?

description: Fetch a specific dashboard by numeric ID
Checking website monitoring status should pick lm_website, not lm_website_group or lm_alert

steps.userPrompt: Check the status of our website monitoring — what sites are being watched?

description: Creating a device group should use lm_device_group, not lm_device

steps.userPrompt: Create a new device group called Production under the root group.

description: Asking about collector group assignments should pick lm_collector_group, not lm_collector

steps.userPrompt: Show me the collector group assignments so I can see how collectors are organized.

description: Asking about website groups should use lm_website_group, not lm_website

steps.userPrompt: I need to see how the website groups are set up — list them for me.

description: Deleting a user by ID should use lm_user delete with the correct id parameter
Asking about session state should select lm_session, not any resource tool

steps.userPrompt: What's in my session right now? I want to see what variables I have stored.

description: Updating a dashboard name by ID should use lm_dashboard update with correct parameters

steps.userPrompt: Update dashboard 15 and change its name to 'Prod Overview'.

description: Question about maintenance windows should select lm_sdt, not lm_device or lm_alert

steps.userPrompt: Are there any scheduled downtimes or maintenance windows active right now?

description: Question about operational notes should select lm_opsnote

steps.userPrompt: Show me the recent ops notes and change logs in LogicMonitor.
